title: Grenfell Tower Inquiry Government Progress Report
body: "This document is a report on the government’s progress on implementing the Grenfell Tower Inquiry’s Phase 2 recommendations. It also updates on Phase 1 recommendations related to Personal Emergency Evacuation Plans (PEEPs).      This report was published in December 2025. Future reports will also be published on this page quarterly (in February, May, September and December) until all recommendations have been implemented.     The report contains a summary of progress and wider reforms and updates on each Phase 2 recommendation and Phase 1 recommendations related to PEEPs. The recommendations are grouped thematically using the same themes of the Inquiry:   the construction industry fire and rescue services response and recovery vulnerable people and Phase 1 recommendations   Translations of the summary will be available from 16 January.  Previous updates for all Phase 1 recommendations were published by the Home Office.  Previous reports  Copies of previous reports are available from the National Archives.   Grenfell Tower Inquiry Government Progress Report - May 2025 Grenfell Tower Inquiry Government Progress Report - September 2025  "
